_meta.description: Priest (Cleric and Druid) spell lists with stats for all PHB spells

1st_level.name: Bless
1st_level.description: Raises the morale of allied creatures by +1 and grants +1 to attack rolls. The priest and allies must not already be in melee when cast.
1st_level.reversible: Curse — lowers morale and imposes -1 to attack rolls on enemies

1st_level.name: Cause Fear
1st_level.description: Causes a creature to flee in panic for 1d4 rounds unless it saves vs. spell. Reverse of Remove Fear.
1st_level.reversible: Remove Fear — calms a frightened creature and grants +4 to saves vs. fear

1st_level.name: Ceremony
1st_level.description: Performs a religious rite: coming of age, dedication, initiation, marriage, or funeral. Grants minor but permanent blessing depending on the rite.
1st_level.material_component: Holy symbol and appropriate ritual materials

1st_level.name: Combine
1st_level.description: Allows 2–5 priests to pool their powers, enabling the central priest to cast spells as if they were of a higher level. Three priests = +2 levels; five priests = +4 levels.

1st_level.name: Command
1st_level.description: Issues a one-word command to a creature (e.g., 'Fall!', 'Flee!', 'Stop!'). Creatures with fewer than 6 HD must obey. Undead are immune. Creatures with INT of 13+ get a save.

1st_level.name: Create Water
1st_level.description: Creates 1 gallon of water per caster level (min 1 gallon). The water is fresh and pure.
1st_level.material_component: A drop of water and a piece of cloud
1st_level.reversible: Destroy Water — destroys an equivalent amount of water

1st_level.name: Cure Light Wounds
1st_level.description: Heals 1d8 HP of damage to the creature touched.
1st_level.reversible: Cause Light Wounds — deals 1d8 HP to the creature touched (save vs. spell negates)

1st_level.name: Detect Evil
1st_level.description: Detects evil emanations from creatures, objects, and areas. Strong evil gives a stronger aura than weak evil.

1st_level.name: Detect Magic
1st_level.description: Reveals magical emanations in the area ahead.

1st_level.name: Endure Cold/Heat
1st_level.description: Protects the subject from normal cold or heat (choose when casting), granting comfort in temperatures from -30°F to 130°F. The target still takes damage from magical fire or cold.

1st_level.name: Entangle
1st_level.description: Causes plants in the area to entangle all creatures within. Entangled creatures are immobilized. Save vs. spell to avoid.

1st_level.name: Faerie Fire
1st_level.area_of_effect: One or more objects or creatures in a 5 ft radius/level
1st_level.description: Outlines objects or creatures with pale blue, green, or violet fire. Outlined creatures cannot use invisibility and are easier to hit (+2 to attack rolls vs. them in darkness; normal visibility otherwise).

1st_level.name: Invisibility to Animals
1st_level.description: Renders the subjects invisible and undetectable to normal animals. Intelligent creatures (INT 5+) are not fooled.

1st_level.name: Invisibility to Undead
1st_level.description: The subject is undetectable and ignored by undead of fewer than 5 HD unless attacked. Undead with 5+ HD get a save to see through the effect.

1st_level.name: Light
1st_level.description: Creates a globe of light equivalent to torchlight. If cast on a creature's eyes, blinds them on a failed save vs. spell.

1st_level.name: Locate Animals or Plants
1st_level.description: Senses the direction of the nearest animal or plant of a specific type within range.

1st_level.name: Magical Stone
1st_level.description: Enchants up to 3 sling stones or pebbles. Each deals 1d6+1 HP damage (1d6+3 vs. undead). Unusable missiles lose the charge after a minute.
1st_level.material_component: The priest's holy symbol and 3 small stones

1st_level.name: Pass Without Trace
1st_level.description: The subjects leave no tracks, scent, or other evidence of passage.
1st_level.material_component: A sprig of pine or evergreen

1st_level.name: Protection from Evil
1st_level.description: As the wizard version: +2 to saves vs. evil creatures, -2 to evil creatures' attack rolls, and blocks summoned/conjured evil creatures from physical contact.
1st_level.material_component: Holy water or incense (good); unholy water or smoldering dung (evil)

1st_level.name: Purify Food & Drink
1st_level.description: Makes spoiled, poisoned, or otherwise contaminated food and water safe to eat and drink.

1st_level.name: Sanctuary
1st_level.description: Prevents enemies from attacking the protected creature unless they save vs. spell. The protected creature cannot attack while protected, or the spell ends.
1st_level.material_component: The priest's holy symbol and a small silver mirror

1st_level.name: Shillelagh
1st_level.description: Enchants an oaken club or staff to become a +1 weapon dealing 2d4 HP damage vs. S/M creatures and 1d4+1 vs. large creatures.
1st_level.material_component: A shamrock leaf and a bit of mistletoe

2nd_level.name: Aid
2nd_level.description: Combines the effects of Bless (morale boost) with a temporary HP bonus of 1d8. The bonus HP are lost first if the target takes damage.
2nd_level.material_component: A tiny strip of white cloth with a sticky substance on the ends

2nd_level.name: Augury
2nd_level.description: Gives a 70% + 1%/level chance to learn whether a specific action in the next 30 minutes will be beneficial, harmful, or neutral.
2nd_level.material_component: Rune sticks, coins, or other divination tools (25 gp per use)

2nd_level.name: Chant
2nd_level.description: The priest chants continuously, granting allies +1 to attack, damage, and saves, while imposing -1 to enemies' rolls. Stacks with Bless.

2nd_level.name: Charm Person or Mammal
2nd_level.description: As wizard Charm Person but also affects non-intelligent mammals.

2nd_level.name: Detect Charm
2nd_level.description: Detects whether any creature in the area is under a Charm effect. The priest can check one creature per round.

2nd_level.name: Detect Life
2nd_level.description: Detects the presence of living creatures, even if suspended, polymorphed, or magically concealed.

2nd_level.name: Dust Devil
2nd_level.description: Creates a minor air elemental (2 HD) that appears as a small dust devil and attacks the priest's enemies.

2nd_level.name: Enthrall
2nd_level.description: Captivates a crowd of listeners who save vs. spell. An enthralled crowd listens spellbound, ignoring other distractions.

2nd_level.name: Find Traps
2nd_level.description: Reveals all traps in the 10 ft wide path ahead, both magical and mechanical, causing them to glow with a blue aura.

2nd_level.name: Heat Metal
2nd_level.description: Heats a metal object: rounds 1 and 7 = warm (no damage); rounds 2 and 6 = hot (1d4 fire damage); rounds 3–5 = searing (2d4 fire damage). A save reduces to half.

2nd_level.name: Hold Person
2nd_level.description: Paralyzes 1–3 humanoids. Each saves separately.
2nd_level.material_component: A small, straight piece of iron

2nd_level.name: Know Alignment
2nd_level.description: Reveals the alignment of one creature per round. Creatures get a save vs. spell to conceal their true alignment.

2nd_level.name: Messenger
2nd_level.description: Compels a small animal to carry a message to a location within range of the spell.

2nd_level.name: Resist Fire/Cold
2nd_level.description: Grants +3 to saving throws vs. fire (or cold), +50% magic fire or cold resistance, and halves fire/cold damage.
2nd_level.material_component: A drop of mercury (fire) or a drop of water (cold)

2nd_level.name: Silence 15' Radius
2nd_level.description: Creates a 15 ft radius sphere of absolute silence. No sound can enter, exit, or exist within. Spells with verbal components cannot be cast inside.

2nd_level.name: Slow Poison
2nd_level.description: Slows the effects of poison already in the body, keeping the victim alive until neutralize poison or other treatment can be administered.

2nd_level.name: Snake Charm
2nd_level.description: Causes snakes within range to cease aggressive actions and stand quietly, charmed. The priest can charm snakes with total HD equal to their own level.

2nd_level.name: Speak with Animals
2nd_level.description: Enables the priest to communicate with any one type of normal or giant animal.

2nd_level.name: Spiritual Hammer
2nd_level.description: Creates a hammer-shaped hammer of force that strikes enemies. Uses the caster's THAC0, deals 1d4+1 damage (1d4 vs. large), and counts as a +1 magical weapon. The priest directs it as a free action.

2nd_level.name: Warp Wood
2nd_level.description: Causes wood in the area to twist and warp, ruining arrows, warping shields and wooden armor, and jamming wooden doors. Reversible to straighten wood.

3rd_level.name: Animate Dead
3rd_level.description: Creates undead skeletons or zombies from corpses. The priest can control 2 HD of undead per level. Undead obey simple commands.
3rd_level.material_component: A drop of blood, a piece of undead flesh, and bone powder

3rd_level.name: Call Lightning
3rd_level.description: Calls down a bolt of lightning from storm clouds above once per turn per caster level. Each bolt deals 2d8 HP + 1d8 per caster level. Requires a storm. The priest can create a storm in 10 minutes if needed.

3rd_level.name: Continual Light
3rd_level.description: Creates permanent daylight-equivalent illumination in a 60 ft radius. Can blind creatures on a failed save if cast on their eyes.

3rd_level.name: Create Food & Water
3rd_level.description: Creates sufficient food and water to feed 3 humans (or 1 horse) per caster level for one day.

3rd_level.name: Cure Blindness or Deafness
3rd_level.description: Cures blindness or deafness, whether natural or magically induced.

3rd_level.name: Cure Disease
3rd_level.description: Cures a creature of all natural and magically caused diseases, including lycanthropy if treated early.

3rd_level.name: Dispel Magic
3rd_level.description: As the wizard version: attempts to cancel all magic in a 30 ft cube.

3rd_level.name: Feign Death
3rd_level.description: Puts the subject into a cataleptic state resembling death. The subject is immune to paralysis, poison, and cold while in this state.

3rd_level.name: Flame Walk
3rd_level.description: Allows the subject to walk through normal fires and magical fires up to the intensity of a Fireball without harm.
3rd_level.material_component: A fire opal worth 2,000 gp and a bit of wick

3rd_level.name: Glyph of Warding
3rd_level.description: Inscribes a magical trap that triggers when entered by an unauthorized creature, releasing a burst of energy (fire, electricity, cold, acid, etc.) dealing 2 HP per caster level.
3rd_level.material_component: Powdered diamond worth 2,000 gp (for glyphs on large areas)

3rd_level.name: Hold Animal
3rd_level.description: Paralyzes 1–4 normal or giant animals. Intelligent and magical animals are not affected.

3rd_level.name: Locate Object
3rd_level.description: Detects the direction toward a well-known object.

3rd_level.name: Magical Vestment
3rd_level.description: Enchants the priest's vestments to have AC 5, +1 per 3 levels above 5th (max AC 1), functioning as armor.

3rd_level.name: Meld into Stone
3rd_level.description: The priest and up to 50 lbs of gear step into a large stone and wait in safety. Cannot see out or act, but cannot be harmed.

3rd_level.name: Negative Plane Protection
3rd_level.description: Protects one creature from energy drain attacks by undead. If drained while protected, the creature gets a save to negate the drain.

3rd_level.name: Plant Growth
3rd_level.description: Causes plants in a 20 ft square per level area to grow to double size and become thick and entangling, costing double movement to pass through.

3rd_level.name: Prayer
3rd_level.description: Grants all allies +1 to attack, damage, and saves, and imposes -1 to all enemies' rolls. Stacks with Chant but not Bless.
3rd_level.material_component: A holy symbol and prayer beads

3rd_level.name: Protection from Fire
3rd_level.description: Grants either complete immunity to normal fire OR a +4 to saves and 50% resistance to magical fire. If cast on the priest, absorbs 12 HP of magical fire per level before ending.

3rd_level.name: Pyrotechnics
3rd_level.description: Uses fire to create blinding fireworks or a dense obscuring smoke cloud.

3rd_level.name: Speak with Dead
3rd_level.description: Allows the priest to ask questions of a deceased creature. Questions allowed: 2 at 7th level, 3 at 9th, etc. Answers may be cryptic or limited by what the deceased knew.

3rd_level.name: Stone Shape
3rd_level.description: Reshapes a 3 cu ft + 1 cu ft/level volume of stone.

3rd_level.name: Summon Insects
3rd_level.description: Summons a swarm of insects to harass an enemy. The target must spend half their time defending against insects, suffering -2 to attack rolls and AC.

3rd_level.name: Water Breathing
3rd_level.description: Grants ability to breathe underwater.

4th_level.name: Abjure
4th_level.description: Attempts to drive off or send back a summoned or extraplanar creature. Roll d20 + caster level; if > target's HD, the creature is driven off.
4th_level.material_component: Holy symbol, holy water, and material from the creature's home plane

4th_level.name: Animal Summoning I
4th_level.description: Summons 8 HD worth of animals of 4 HD or fewer each to serve the caster. Animals arrive in 1d4 rounds if available nearby.

4th_level.name: Call Woodland Beings
4th_level.description: Summons woodland beings — nymphs, dryads, brownies, pixies, or satyrs — to aid the caster.
4th_level.material_component: A pinch of summer soil, a handful of acorns

4th_level.name: Cloak of Bravery
4th_level.description: Grants the subject immunity to all forms of magical fear. Lasts until the subject is exposed to fear magic (then allows a +4 save).
4th_level.material_component: The feathers of an eagle or condor

4th_level.name: Cure Serious Wounds
4th_level.description: Heals 2d8+1 HP of damage.

4th_level.name: Detect Lie
4th_level.description: Detects whether a creature is intentionally lying. Subjects can save to avoid the effect.

4th_level.name: Divination
4th_level.description: Grants 60% + 1%/level chance to receive a meaningful answer about an upcoming event of concern. Better than Augury but less reliable than higher-level divination.
4th_level.material_component: Incense and sacrificial offering worth 250 gp

4th_level.name: Free Action
4th_level.description: The subject is immune to all hold and slow spells and can move and attack at full speed underwater.

4th_level.name: Giant Insect
4th_level.description: Enlarges 1–6 insects into giant versions (giant ant, giant beetle, etc.) which then serve the caster.

4th_level.name: Hallucinatory Forest
4th_level.description: Creates an illusory forest in an area up to 40 ft per level in diameter. Creatures who enter believe it to be real; only druids, wood elves, and certain fey can see through it.

4th_level.name: Hold Plant
4th_level.description: Immobilizes plant creatures (shambling mounds, treants, etc.) in a 1–4 creature area.

4th_level.name: Imbue with Spell Ability
4th_level.description: Transfers spell ability to a non-spellcaster, allowing them to cast 1–3 priest spells (based on recipient's WIS). The priest loses those spell slots.

4th_level.name: Lower Water
4th_level.description: Lowers the level of a body of water by 5% per caster level.

4th_level.name: Neutralize Poison
4th_level.description: Detoxifies any sort of venom in the creature touched. If the target has already died from poison, resurrects them with 1 HP if cast within 10 rounds.

4th_level.name: Protection from Lightning
4th_level.description: Grants immunity to normal lightning and +4 to saves vs. magical lightning. If cast on the priest, absorbs 10 HP per level of electrical damage before ending.

4th_level.name: Reflecting Pool
4th_level.description: Shows images in a pool or similar natural body of water of a creature or location the priest knows.

4th_level.name: Repel Insects
4th_level.description: Creates a 10 ft radius area that repels normal insects. Giant insects must save vs. spell or avoid the area (they can enter but take 1d6 HP per round).
4th_level.material_component: Mistletoe and a bit of flower-scented incense

4th_level.name: Speak with Plants
4th_level.description: Enables the priest to speak with plant life and make plant creatures (treants, etc.) act favorably.

4th_level.name: Spell Immunity
4th_level.description: Grants the subject complete immunity to one specific spell that the priest has previously experienced (been affected by or seen cast).
4th_level.material_component: Holy symbol and an item related to the spell in question

4th_level.name: Sticks to Snakes
4th_level.description: Transforms 2d8 sticks into snakes. The snakes obey the caster. 50% chance each snake is venomous.
4th_level.material_component: A handful of sticks or twigs

5th_level.name: Animal Growth
5th_level.description: Doubles the size of up to 8 normal animals. Doubled animals gain double HD, +2 to damage, and doubled weight/movement.

5th_level.name: Animal Summoning II
5th_level.description: Summons 6 HD worth of animals of 8 HD or fewer to serve the caster.

5th_level.name: Anti-Plant Shell
5th_level.description: Creates a 15 ft diameter hemisphere that no plant life can penetrate. Wood, vegetation, or plant creatures cannot pass through.

5th_level.name: Atonement
5th_level.description: Cleanses the guilt of a character who has violated alignment or their deity's code through no intentional fault. Requires a quest or offering from the penitent.
5th_level.material_component: Burning incense, at least 500 gp of rare materials, and prayer beads

5th_level.name: Commune
5th_level.description: Puts the priest in spiritual contact with their deity, who answers one question per 2 caster levels (yes/no answers). Can be used only once per week.
5th_level.material_component: Holy symbol, incense, and a holy water font worth 500 gp

5th_level.name: Commune with Nature
5th_level.description: Druid ability: becomes one with the natural world, gaining knowledge of the terrain, animals, plants, water, and weather within 1 mile per level.

5th_level.name: Control Winds
5th_level.description: Alters wind speed in a 40 ft radius per level: calm to gale force. Strong winds affect missile fire, movement, and breathing.

5th_level.name: Dispel Evil
5th_level.description: Allows the priest to strike and teleport back an evil creature (summoned or extraplanar); alternatively, negates enchantments placed by an evil being.

5th_level.name: Flame Strike
5th_level.description: Calls down a column of fire 5 ft in radius, 30 ft tall, dealing 6d8 HP fire damage. Save vs. spell for half.

5th_level.name: Insect Plague
5th_level.description: Summons a cloud of insects in a 180 ft x 60 ft area. Creatures with fewer than 5 HD flee; those with 5–7 HD suffer -2 to attack rolls; 8+ HD are unaffected by the swarm but must fight through it.
5th_level.material_component: A few grains of sugar, some kernels of grain, and a smear of fat

5th_level.name: Magic Font
5th_level.description: A holy water font functions as a crystal ball with the scrying ability for 1 use per 2 caster levels.

5th_level.name: Pass Plant
5th_level.description: Allows the priest to step into one plant of their own type and emerge from any other plant of the same species within range.

5th_level.name: Plane Shift
5th_level.description: Transports the priest and up to 7 linked companions to a different plane of existence. Target plane depends on the metal rod used as material component.
5th_level.material_component: A forked metal rod attuned to the destination plane

5th_level.name: Quest
5th_level.description: Compels a creature to perform a specific quest. If the creature fails to attempt the quest, it suffers a -1 penalty to all rolls each day until it does.

5th_level.name: Raise Dead
5th_level.description: Restores life to a creature that has been dead no more than 1 day per caster level. The creature is brought back with 1 HP and needs bed rest.

5th_level.name: Spike Stones
5th_level.description: Causes spikes to protrude from rocky ground in a 10 sq ft per level area, dealing 1d4+4 HP to each creature in the area per round and halving movement.

5th_level.name: Transmute Rock to Mud
5th_level.description: Transforms up to a 20 ft cube per level of natural rock and soil into mud. Creatures in the area sink into the mud, greatly slowing movement.

5th_level.name: True Seeing
5th_level.description: Enables the subject to see all things as they actually are: invisible creatures, illusions, secret doors, astral projections, polymorphed creatures, etc. within 120 ft.
5th_level.material_component: An ointment of mushroom powder, saffron, and fat

6th_level.name: Aerial Servant
6th_level.description: Summons an invisible aerial servant to retrieve an object. The servant travels quickly to find and return the item; if it cannot, it returns in foul mood.

6th_level.name: Animal Summoning III
6th_level.description: Summons 4 HD worth of animals of 16 HD or fewer each to serve the caster.

6th_level.name: Animate Object
6th_level.description: Gives limited animation to up to 25 lbs per level of non-living material. The animated objects attack as directed.

6th_level.name: Anti-Animal Shell
6th_level.description: Creates a 10 ft diameter hemisphere that normal animals cannot penetrate.

6th_level.name: Blade Barrier
6th_level.description: Creates a whirling barrier of blades that deals 8d8 HP to any creature passing through.

6th_level.name: Conjure Animals
6th_level.description: Conjures one or more animals with total HD not exceeding twice the caster's level. The animals arrive and obey.

6th_level.name: Find the Path
6th_level.description: The subject always knows the most direct route to their current destination, including through mazes, dungeons, and curses.
6th_level.material_component: A set of divination sticks or bones worth 100 gp

6th_level.name: Forbiddance
6th_level.description: Seals an area (60 sq ft per level) against planar travel and entry by alignment-opposed creatures. Aligned creatures attempting to enter take 2d6 or 4d6 HP depending on alignment difference.
6th_level.material_component: Holy water worth 1,000 gp per 60 sq ft area

6th_level.name: Heal
6th_level.description: Heals all damage, cures blindness, disease, feeblemindedness, and insanity. Leaves the subject with exactly 1 HP less than their maximum.

6th_level.name: Heroes' Feast
6th_level.description: Creates a great feast for one creature per level. Those who eat gain 1d8 temporary HP, immunity to poison and disease for 12 hours, and +1 to attack and saves vs. fear for 12 hours.
6th_level.material_component: A specially prepared altar cloth and 100 gp of rare spices

6th_level.name: Liveoak
6th_level.description: Enchants an oak tree to transform into a treant-like guardian when a specific trigger condition is met.

6th_level.name: Part Water
6th_level.description: Parts a body of water as Moses parted the sea. Creates a trough up to 3 ft wide per level and 20 ft deep.

6th_level.name: Speak with Monsters
6th_level.description: Enables the priest to communicate with any creature that has any form of language (including monsters).

6th_level.name: Stone Tell
6th_level.description: The priest can question rock about what it has observed: creatures, weather, events, etc. The rock answers in its slow, deliberate manner.
6th_level.material_component: Clay, which is worn over the hands

6th_level.name: Transmute Water to Dust
6th_level.description: Transmutes up to 1 cubic ft per level of water into fine dust. Creatures in the water receive a save or take 1d6 HP and become stunned for 1 round.
6th_level.material_component: Powdered chalk, sand, and normal (unhallowed) water

6th_level.name: Transport via Plants
6th_level.description: Allows the priest and 8 others to enter a plant of their kind and emerge from any other plant of the same type on the same plane, even at great distance.

6th_level.name: Turn Wood
6th_level.description: Drives away wooden objects in a 20 ft wide x 60 ft long cone. Objects in the path fly away as if hit by a Gust of Wind.

6th_level.name: Wall of Stone
6th_level.description: Creates a wall of stone up to 1 in/level thick. Functions as the wizard spell Wall of Stone.

6th_level.name: Wall of Thorns
6th_level.description: Creates a wall of dense, thorn-covered undergrowth. Each 10 ft cube is treated as very tough vegetation; forcing through deals 8 HP minus AC (minimum 1) per round.

6th_level.name: Weather Summoning
6th_level.description: Calls a specific weather pattern appropriate to the season and climate within 1d4 x 10 minutes.

6th_level.name: Word of Recall
6th_level.description: Instantly transports the priest and up to 250 lbs + 150 lbs/level back to a sanctuary location chosen when the spell was prepared.

7th_level.name: Animate Rock
7th_level.description: Animates up to 2 cubic ft per level of rock or stone, causing it to move and attack as directed.

7th_level.name: Astral Spell
7th_level.description: As the wizard spell: transports the caster's astral form to the astral plane, with a silver cord connecting back to the body.

7th_level.name: Change Staff
7th_level.description: Transforms a staff into a treant-like creature for the duration, or vice versa.

7th_level.name: Chariot of Sustarre
7th_level.description: Conjures a blazing chariot drawn by fiery horses that can move through air at 24 (flying). The chariot carries the priest and up to 8 others.
7th_level.material_component: A piece of wood, two holly berries, and burning incense

7th_level.name: Confusion
7th_level.description: As the wizard Confusion spell: causes 2d8 creatures to act randomly each round.

7th_level.name: Conjure Earth Elemental
7th_level.description: Summons a 16 HD earth elemental to serve the caster. Unlike wizard summoned elementals, the priest's elemental is fully controlled and loyal.

7th_level.name: Control Weather
7th_level.description: Changes the weather in a 4d4 square mile area. Can produce any natural weather appropriate to the season.
7th_level.material_component: Burning incense and bits of earth, wood, and water

7th_level.name: Creeping Doom
7th_level.description: Calls 10 insects per caster level to swarm in a centipede-like cloud. The swarm can be directed and deals 1 HP per round per 10 insects to any target it engulfs.

7th_level.name: Earthquake
7th_level.description: Strikes a 5 ft radius per level area with intense tremors. Causes caves to collapse, structures to crumble, and creatures to be knocked down.
7th_level.material_component: Dirt, stone, and a piece of clay

7th_level.name: Exaction
7th_level.description: Compels an extraplanar being to perform a specific task. The creature must obey or be destroyed, but the priest may face consequences for the demands made.

7th_level.name: Fire Storm
7th_level.description: Creates a roaring conflagration in a 2 cubic ft per level area, dealing 2d8 HP fire damage. Save for half.

7th_level.name: Gate
7th_level.description: As the wizard Gate spell: opens a portal through which a named extraplanar being is summoned. The being is not under the priest's control.

7th_level.name: Holy Word
7th_level.description: Utterance of a powerful divine word. Evil creatures with fewer HD than the caster are killed, banished, paralyzed, blinded, or deafened depending on their HD.

7th_level.name: Regenerate
7th_level.description: Regrows severed body parts. Limb reattachment takes 1 round; complete regeneration of a limb takes 2d4 turns.

7th_level.name: Reincarnate
7th_level.description: Brings back a dead person in a new body, which may be a different race or creature type. The DM rolls randomly for the new form.

7th_level.name: Restoration
7th_level.description: Restores lost experience levels drained by undead or similar effects. One level is restored. The priest is exhausted for 1–3 days afterward.

7th_level.name: Resurrection
7th_level.description: Raises the dead with full HP and abilities, regardless of how long they've been dead. The priest must rest for 1 day per level of the raised creature.

7th_level.name: Symbol
7th_level.description: Inscribes a magical symbol on a surface that triggers an effect when read or passed: hopelessness, pain, persuasion, fear, stunning, insanity, or death.
7th_level.material_component: Powdered black opal and diamond dust worth at least 5,000 gp

7th_level.name: Transmute Metal to Wood
7th_level.description: Transforms metal objects (including magic items on a save at -2) into wood. Weapons of metal affected deal 50% less damage.
7th_level.material_component: A pinch of iron filings and a handful of sawdust

7th_level.name: Wind Walk
7th_level.description: Allows the priest and up to one other creature per level to become vaporous and travel with the wind at 60 mph. They are intangible while in this form.
7th_level.material_component: Holy symbol and fire and water
